title: Stockman
description: T-shirt customization at Stockman stores. Live painting for shoppers — unique designs created right on the sales floor.

details.task: Organize live t-shirt customization at Stockman stores.
details.solution: Set up a custom zone with artists right on the sales floor. Every shopper received a t-shirt with an individual hand-painted design.
details.result: Over 100 custom t-shirts. The activation attracted new audiences and increased store foot traffic.
